channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: California DMV apologizes for Cybertruck's offensive license plate
item.description: On Thursday, the license plate in question, which was on a Tesla Cybertruck, was spotlighted in a post to X by StopAntisemitism, a group “dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KRON4

item.title: Mysterious googly eyes go viral after appearing on public art in Oregon
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Googly eyes have been appearing on sculptures around the central Oregon city of Bend, delighting many residents and sparking a viral sensation covered widely by news outlets and featured on a popular late-night talk show.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Biden's commutation in 'kids for cash' scandal angers some Pennsylvania families
item.description: A judge who helped orchestrate one of the worst judicial scandals in U.S.history — a scheme to send children to for-profit jails in exchange for kickbacks — was among the 1,500 people whose sentences were commuted by President Joe Biden this week.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL RUBINKAM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says GOP will push to eliminate daylight saving time
item.description: President-elect Trump on Friday said Republicans would push to eliminate daylight saving time, calling it "inconvenient" and "costly.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Capitol rioter who tried to join Russian army is sentenced to prison for probation violation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A Dallas man who tried to fly overseas to join the Russian military and fight against Ukraine was sentenced on Friday to six months in prison for violating the terms of his probation for storming the U.S. Capitol four years ago. Kevin Loftus, a 56-year-old veteran of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Drones, planes or UFOs? Americans abuzz over mysterious New Jersey sightings
item.description: It’s unclear if that buzzing sound coming out of New Jersey is drones or something else, but for sure the nighttime sightings are producing tons of talk, a raft of conspiracy theories and craned necks looking skyward.
item.dc:creator: Mike Catalini, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Supreme Court will hear Catholic charitable group's plea to be free from Wisconsin unemployment tax
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday said it would take up a new religious rights case over whether a Catholic charitable organization must pay Wisconsin's employment tax.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO shooter manhunt aided by San Francisco police tip
item.description: Days before Luigi Mangione was found after an officer in the Special Victims Unit of the San Francisco PD recognized Mangione in photos.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ingle, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court will take up a challenge related to California's tough vehicle emissions standards
item.description: The Supreme Court says it will take up a business-backed appeal that could make it easier to challenge federal regulations, acting in a dispute related to California’s nation-leading standards for vehicle emissions.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sherman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nephew's Christmas revelation leads to cold-case killer's prison sentence
item.description: A convicted killer who had escaped justice for more than a decade learned Thursday that he will likely spend the rest of his life in prison.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hayes, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New Jersey governor wants more federal resources for probe into drone sightings
item.description: TOMS RIVER, N.J. (AP) — Gov. Phil Murphy has asked the Biden administration to put more resources into an investigation of mysterious drone sightings that have been reported in New Jersey and nearby states.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A man has pleaded guilty to the death of a 5-year-old girl living in their Kansas homeless camp
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A man who lived in a makeshift camp with a homeless 5-year-old Kansas girl and her father pleaded guilty Friday to first-degree murder and rape in connection with the child’s death.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Two states sue Glock over add-on allowing machine gun-like firing
item.description: Officials in New Jersey and Minnesota filed a lawsuit against gun manufacturer Glock Thursday, demanding the company suspend its sale of weapons that can be easily converted with a switch to allow over 1,000 rounds of rapid fire.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Iran has new drone ship in Persian Gulf
item.description: Iran has a new ship with the capability of launching drones, according to satellite images reviewed by Maxar Technologies that were shared with The Hill. The new drone ship, called Shahid Bagheri, is anchored offshore of the Iranian naval port of Bandar Abbas in the Persian Gulf, according to Maxar.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI's Altman will donate $1 million to Trump's inaugural fund
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is planning to make a $1 million personal donation to President-Elect Donald Trump's inauguration fund, joining a number of tech companies and executives who are working to improve their relationships with the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Flight from LaGuardia diverts to JFK after bird strike: American Airlines
item.description: A flight from LaGuardia Airport to North Carolina was diverted to John F. Kennedy International Airport on Thursday evening due to a reported bird strike, according to American Airlines.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Back trouble and brain fog bothered suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing, his posts show
item.description: After Luigi Mangione made the difficult decision to undergo spinal surgery last year for chronic back pain, he became a proponent of the procedure that changed his life for the better.
item.dc:creator: LEA SKENE and JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: North Dakota regulators OK underground storage for proposed Midwest carbon dioxide pipeline
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — North Dakota regulators approved permits Thursday for underground storage of carbon dioxide delivered through a massive pipeline proposed for the Midwest, marking another victory for a project that has drawn fierce opposition from landowners.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Here's how Airbnb is trying to block New Year's Eve parties
item.description: Airbnb is stepping up efforts to prevent unauthorized and disruptive parties this New Year’s Eve - or at least trying to. The short-term property rental company is rolling out new anti-party technology around the globe, aiming to block high-risk bookings.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Traces of fentanyl were found inside bottlenose dolphins that were found dead in the Gulf of Mexico, raising concerns that the deadly drug may be affecting other sea life.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5

item.title: Recall issued for 2.6 million travel mugs over burn risk
item.description: Stanley has announced a recall of approximately 2.6 million Switchback and Trigger Action travel mugs, citing a burn hazard. The recall, which was issued in cooperation with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump invites China's Xi to his inauguration even as he threatens massive tariffs on Beijing
item.description: Asked at a Chinese Foreign Ministry briefing on Thursday about Trump's invitation, spokesperson Mao Ning responded: “I have nothing to share at present.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Many New Jersey 'drone' sightings are lawfully operated manned aircraft, White House says
item.description: White House national security spokesman John Kirby said there's no evidence that the New Jersey drone sightings are the work for foreign adversaries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: What Obama told Bibi
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: READ: Here is Biden's full list of clemencies
item.description: President Biden early Thursday announced that he is pardoning 39 people and commuting the sentences of nearly 1,500 others, setting a new daily record for clemency with a focus on those who were under home confinement during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Balluck, Fox 5

item.title: Trump again named Time's Person of the Year
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump rang the opening bell Thursday at the New York Stock Exchange after being recognized for the second time by Time magazine as its Person of the Year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Christopher Wray to resign as FBI director ahead of Trump takeover
item.description: FBI Director Christopher Wray announced Wednesday he plans to resign from the agency, leaving his post ahead of President-Trump's apparent plans to fire him.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, ABC 4

item.title: The Amazing Kreskin, renowned mentalist and frequent late-night guest, dies at 89
item.description: The Amazing Kreskin, an entertainer and mentalist who rose to fame amid frequent appearances on TV talk shows like “The Tonight Show” and “The Mike Douglas Show,” has died, his family confirmed on social media. He was 89 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Adorable reaction caught on camera as infant gets new glasses
item.description: An adorable reaction was caught on camera when an infant received a brand new pair of glasses that allowed him to see his parents clearly for the very first time.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Kayaker who faked his death, fled the US charged after returning to Wisconsin
item.description: Police had previously said they believed Borgwardt planned his Aug. 12 disappearance and tried to conceal his efforts to mislead investigations.
item.dc:creator: Indiana Schilz, Fox 5

item.title: Luigi Mangione was reported missing 2 weeks before CEO slain: police
item.description: The parents of Luigi Mangione, the man suspected of shooting and killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, told law enforcement that they hadn't heard from their son in months.
item.dc:creator: Video credit: Nicole Johnson, ABC 4

item.title: Only about 2 in 10 Americans approve of Biden's pardon of his son Hunter, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Only about 2 in 10 Americans approve of President Joe Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter after earlier promising he would do no such thing, according to a poll from The Associated Press-NORC Center for Public Affairs Research.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DA suggests unusual idea for halting Trump’s hush money case while upholding his conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Eager to preserve President-elect Donald Trump ’s hush money conviction even as he returns to office, prosecutors are suggesting various ways forward — including one based on how some courts handle criminal cases when defendants die. Trump’s spokesperson called the ideas “pathetic.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4
